headline: Stocks to Watch Monday Recap: Norwegian Cruise Line, United Airlines, Lumentum, Elevance
summary: ↘️ United Airlines (UAL), American Airlines (AAL): Global carriers extended cancellations and rerouted flights to avoid the Middle East. Airline stocks dropped. Meantime, regulators are looking to cut flights this summer at Chicago’s O’Hare airport, where United and American duke it out for supremacy.

headline: Nvidia–Coherent deal, Paramount+ to be combined with HBO Max
summary: Market Domination host Josh Lipton and Yahoo Finance Senior Reporter Brooke DiPalma take a look at some of Monday's trending tickers and stories. HBO Max and Paramount+ will be combining into a single streaming platform. This comes after Warner Bros. Discovery (WBD) accepted Paramount's (PSKY) acquisition bid. Elevance (ELV) stock is dropping after the Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services planned sanctions on the company. Nvidia (NVDA) and Coherent (COHR) announced a strategic partnership on developing optics technology. To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Market Domination.

headline: Rachel Chinetti Named President of Wellpoint Tennessee
summary: NASHVILLE, Tenn., March 02, 2026--Wellpoint Tennessee, a wholly owned subsidiary of Elevance Health, announced today that Rachel Chinetti has been named president of the health plan, which provides managed care benefits for TennCare, Tennessee’s Medicaid program serving roughly 1.4 million people statewide.
